simp [abs_mul, abs_of_nonneg (show (3 : ℝ) ≥ 0 by norm_num)]
  have h3 : |h| < δ := by
    calc
      |h| = |h - 0| := by simp [sub_zero]
      _ < δ := hh
  have h4 : |h| < 1 := by
    calc
      |h| < δ := h3
      _ ≤ 1 := δ_le1
  have h5 : |h| < 3 * |x| + 1 := by
    have h6 : 0 ≤ 3 * |x| := by positivity
    have h7 : 0 ≤ 1 := by norm_num
    have h8 : 0 ≤ 3 * |x| + 1 := by positivity
    nlinarith [abs_nonneg h]
  have h6 : 3 * |x| + |h| ≤ 3 * |x| + 1 := by
    linarith [abs_nonneg h]
  linarith

simp [abs_mul, abs_of_nonneg, show (0 : ℝ) ≤ 3 by norm_num]
    <;>
    ring_nf
  have h₈ : |h| < δ := by
    have h₉ : |h - 0| < δ := hh
    have h₁₀ : |h - 0| = |h| := by simp [sub_zero]
    rw [h₁₀] at h₉
    exact h₉
  have h₉ : |h| < 1 := by
    have h₁₀ : δ ≤ 1 := δ_le1
    linarith
  have h₁₀ : |3 * x + h| ≤ 3 * |x| + |h| := by
    linarith
  have h₁₁ : 3 * |x| + |h| ≤ 3 * |x| + 1 := by
    have h₁₂ : |h| < 1 := h₉
    have h₁₃ : |h| ≤ 1 := by linarith
    linarith
  linarith
have h₆ : |h - 0| * |3 * x + h| < ε := by
  have h₇ : |h - 0| < δ := hh
  have h₈ : |h - 0| = |h| := by simp [sub_zero]
  rw [h₈] at h₇
  have h₉ : |h| < δ := h₇
  have h₁₀ : |h| < 1 := by
    have h₁₁ : δ ≤ 1 := δ_le1
    linarith
  have h₁₁ : |h| * |3 * x + h| < ε := by
    have h₁₂ : |3 * x + h| ≤ 3 * |x| + 1 := h₅
    have h₁₃ : |h| < δ := h₉
    have h₁₄ : δ ≤ ε / (3 * |x| + 1) := δ_le2
    have h₁₅ : 0 < 3 * |x| + 1 := by positivity
    have h₁₆ : |h| < ε / (3 * |x| + 1) := by
      calc
        |h| < δ := h₁₃
        _ ≤ ε / (3 * |x| + 1) := h₁₄
    have h₁₇ : |h| * (3 * |x| + 1) < ε := by
      calc
        |h| * (3 * |x| + 1) < (ε / (3 * |x| + 1)) * (3 * |x| + 1) := by
          gcongr
          <;>
          linarith
        _ = ε := by
          field_simp [h₁₅.ne']
          <;>
          ring_nf
          <;>
          linarith
    calc
      |h| * |3 * x + h| ≤ |h| * (3 * |x| + 1) := by
        gcongr
        <;>
        linarith
      _ < ε := h₁₇
  calc
    |h - 0| * |3 * x + h| = |h| * |3 * x + h| := by simp [sub_zero]
    _ < ε := h₁₁
  <;>
  try norm_num
  <;>
  linarith
simp_all [h₃, h₄]
 <;>
 try norm_num
 <;>
 linarith

simpa using (hasDerivAt_pow 3 (0 : ℝ)).comp 0 (hasDerivAt_id 0)
      exact h₂
    exact h₁
  exact h

simpa using hh
    have h₂ : δ ≤ 1 := δ_le1
    have h₃ : |h| < 1 := by
      calc
        |h| = |h - 0| := by simp [abs_sub_comm]
        _ < δ := h₁
        _ ≤ 1 := h₂
    exact h₃
  have h_abs_3x_add_h_le : |3 * x + h| ≤ 3 * |x| + |h| := by
    calc
      |3 * x + h| ≤ |3 * x| + |h| := abs_add (3 * x) h
      _ = 3 * |x| + |h| := by
        simp [abs_mul, abs_of_nonneg (show (3 : ℝ) ≥ 0 by norm_num)]
        <;>
        ring_nf
        <;>
        norm_num
  have h_3x_abs_add_abs_h_le : 3 * |x| + |h| ≤ 3 * |x| + 1 := by
    linarith [abs_nonneg h]
  calc
    |3 * x + h| ≤ 3 * |x| + |h| := h_abs_3x_add_h_le
    _ ≤ 3 * |x| + 1 := h_3x_abs_add_abs_h_le

simp [abs_sub_comm]
          _ < δ := hh
          _ ≤ 1 := δ_le1
      linarith
sorry

simp
  rw [h3] at h2
  have h4 : |h| < δ := h2
  have h5 : |h| < 1 := by
    calc
      |h| < δ := h4
      _ ≤ 1 := δ_le1
  have h6 : |h| < ε / (3 * |x| + 1) := by
    calc
      |h| < δ := h4
      _ ≤ ε / (3 * |x| + 1) := δ_le2
  have h7 : |3 * x + h| ≤ 3 * |x| + 1 := by
    calc
      |3 * x + h| ≤ |3 * x| + |h| := abs_add (3 * x) h
      _ = 3 * |x| + |h| := by simp [abs_mul, abs_of_pos, abs_of_nonneg, le_of_lt]
      _ ≤ 3 * |x| + 1 := by
        have h8 : |h| ≤ 1 := by
          linarith [abs_nonneg h]
        linarith [abs_nonneg h]
  exact h7

simp [abs_mul, abs_of_nonneg (show (0 : ℝ) ≤ 3 by norm_num)]
  have h3 : |h| < δ := by
    calc
      |h| = |h - 0| := by ring_nf
      _ < δ := by simpa using hh
  have h4 : δ ≤ 1 := δ_le1
  have h5 : |h| < 1 := by linarith
  have h6 : |h| ≥ 0 := abs_nonneg h
  have h7 : 3 * |x| + |h| ≤ 3 * |x| + 1 := by
    linarith
  linarith

simpa using (hasDerivAt_pow 3 x)
    exact h1
  exact h

simp [abs_mul, abs_of_pos (show (0 : ℝ) < 3 by norm_num)]
    _ ≤ 3 * |x| + 1 := by
      have h2 : |h| < δ := by
        simpa [abs_of_nonneg (le_of_lt hne)] using hh
      have h3 : δ ≤ 1 := δ_le1
      have h4 : |h| < 1 := by linarith
      have h5 : |h| ≤ 1 := by
        linarith [abs_nonneg h]
      linarith

simpa [abs_lt] using hh
  have h4 : δ ≤ 1 := δ_le1
  have h5 : |h| < 1 := by linarith
  have h6 : |3 * x + h| ≤ 3 * |x| + 1 := by
    calc
      |3 * x + h| ≤ 3 * |x| + |h| := h2
      _ < 3 * |x| + 1 := by
        linarith
  exact h6

simp [abs_mul, abs_of_nonneg (by norm_num : (0 : ℝ) ≤ 3)]
    _ ≤ 3 * |x| + 1 := by
      have h2 : |h| < 1 := by
        calc
          |h| = |h - 0| := by simp
          _ < δ := hh
          _ ≤ 1 := δ_le1
      have h3 : |h| ≤ 1 := by linarith
      linarith

simp [abs_mul, abs_of_nonneg (show (0 : ℝ) ≤ 3 by norm_num)]
      <;> ring_nf
    _ ≤ 3 * |x| + 1 := by
      have h2 : |h| < δ := by
        calc
          |h| = |h - 0| := by simp
          _ < δ := hh
      have h3 : δ ≤ 1 := δ_le1
      have h4 : |h| < 1 := by linarith
      have h5 : |h| < 1 := by linarith
      have h6 : |h| < 1 := by linarith
      have h7 : |h| < 1 := by linarith
      -- Since |h| < 1, we have |h| < 1, which implies |h| ≤ 1.
      -- Therefore, 3 * |x| + |h| ≤ 3 * |x| + 1.
      have h8 : |h| ≤ 1 := by linarith [abs_nonneg h]
      linarith

simp [abs_mul, abs_of_nonneg (show (0 : ℝ) ≤ 3 by norm_num)]
      <;> ring_nf
    _ ≤ 3 * |x| + 1 := by
      linarith
